data.title: Premier Radiology Services Acquires Global Imaging Solutions to Strengthen Teleradiology Coverage and Subspecialty Expertise
data.description: Premier Radiology Services has recently acquired Global Imaging Solutions (GLOBIS), a prominent teleradiology group specializing in providing subspecialty imaging services to outpatient imaging centers and orthopedic practices. This acquisition enhances Premier’s capabilities by expanding its subspecialized services and reinforcing its support for advanced diagnostic imaging requirements across the country. The addition of GLOBIS is a significant move for Premier and marks a new chapter in its growth trajectory.

data.title: Guardian Completes Integration With FINEOS to Expand Digital Capabilities and Deliver a Simplified Leave Experience
data.description: In New York, Guardian Life Insurance Company of America has fully integrated FINEOS AdminSuite for Employee Benefits into Guardian Absence Solutions™ to offer family-friendly benefits to employers of all sizes. This move aims to drive utilization of high-impact benefits and provide a seamless leave planning experience for businesses. The integration caters to businesses of varying scales, ensuring a comprehensive absence management solution.

NASA: IDENTIFIES ISSUE WITH COMMUNICATION TO FLIGHT TERMINATION SYSTEM FOR ARTEMIS II LAUNCH

data.title: The Estée Lauder Companies Fully Establishes Its “One ELC” Operating Model and Reaches Milestone in Its Profit Recovery and Growth Plan
data.description: Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) has appointed WPP as its inaugural global media partner, a pivotal move in advancing its One ELC operating model. This model, aimed at enhancing efficiency, speed, and overall growth, represents a notable step forward. The Company's implementation of One ELC also signifies a major achievement within its Profit Recovery and Growth Plan's (PRGP) Restructuring Program, a vital component of the Beauty Reimagined strategy. This strategic decision is integral to the Company's ongoing commitment to optimizing performance and maximizing potential.

data.title: Inc. Names Total Office Solutions to Its 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Southwest
data.description: In Irving, Texas, Total Office Solutions has achieved a significant milestone by being featured in the prestigious Inc. 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Southwest. This recognition highlights the remarkable growth and success of Total Office Solutions in the region. The inclusion in this list underscores the company's commitment to excellence and innovation in its business operations. Being part of this exclusive list showcases the company's rapid expansion and success in the industry.

data.title: The Cheesecake Factory Named to Fortune’s ‘100 Best Companies to Work For’ List for Thirteenth Time
data.description: A California-based company, The Cheesecake Factory® (NASDAQ: CAKE), has once again achieved recognition as one of the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® for the thirteenth consecutive year. This prestigious honor is bestowed by Fortune media and Great Place to Work®, with The Cheesecake Factory securing the 25th spot on the list. The accolade is reserved for organizations that cultivate a culture of trust, generosity, and high performance for their employees. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to providing a positive and supportive work environment for its staff.

data.title: Ero Copper to Release First Quarter 2026 Operating and Financial Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Ero Copper Corp. (TSX: ERO, NYSE: ERO) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 operating and financial results on May 4, 2026, after market close. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for May 5, 2026, at 11:30am Eastern time. This will also be available via webcast link and on the Company's website.

data.title: Petrus Resources Declares Monthly Dividend for April 2026
data.description: Calgary-based Petrus Resources Ltd. (TSX: PRQ) has announced a monthly dividend of $0.01 per share, scheduled to be paid on April 30, 2026. The Board of Directors confirmed this decision, which is applicable to shareholders recorded on April 15, 2026. This dividend is classified as an eligible dividend for Canadian income tax considerations.

data.title: Diversified Royalty Corp. Announces Incremental Royalty Purchase from Cheba Hut
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 1, 2026, Diversified Royalty Corp. (TSX: DIV, DIV.DB.A, DIV.DB.B) disclosed acquiring a US$0.9 million yearly incremental royalty from Cheba Hut Franchising, Inc. for US$7.2 million.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP investigates whether Cyclerion Therapeutics Inc. is obtaining a Fair Price for Public Shareholders
data.description: Milwaukee, on April 1, 2026 - Ademi LLP is currently looking into Cyclerion (NASDAQ: CYCN) concerning potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations related to its newly revealed deal with Korsana. For those interested in participating in the investigation and acquiring further details, refer to the link provided.

data.title: Pennant Acquires Arbor Rose Senior Living Community in Mesa, Arizona
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Eagle, Idaho, The Pennant Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PNTG) revealed the acquisition of the real estate and operations of Arbor Rose Senior Living in Mesa, Arizona. This senior living community will be rebranded as Lavender Lane Senior Living. The Pennant Group is the parent company overseeing a range of home health, hospice, home care, and senior living entities. This move signifies a strategic expansion in the senior living sector and showcases their commitment to growing their portfolio in the industry.

data.title: Allied Announces Conference Call to Discuss First-Quarter Financial Results
data.description: A real estate investment trust, Allied Properties (TSX:AP.UN), is set to discuss their financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company will host a conference call and live audio webcast on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. (ET). The financial results are scheduled to be revealed on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, after the markets conclude trading.

data.title: Precision Drilling Corporation Announces Filing of Management Information Circular and Virtual-Only Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Precision Drilling Corporation, known as Precision, disclosed the release of its Management Information Circular for the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The document can be accessed through the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca and the Company’s EDGAR Next profile at www.sec.gov, or directly from Precision’s website at www.precisiondrilling.com. The Annual Meeting is significant for shareholders as it provides crucial insights into the company's performance and future plans. This move emphasizes Precision’s commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement.

data.title: Piedmont Realty Trust, Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Atlanta-based Piedmont Realty Trust (NYSE: PDM) is set to unveil its first quarter financial results on April 30, 2026, after the market closes. Following this, on May 1, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET, a conference call will take place to delve into the results, recent developments, and engage in a Q&A session. The call will be live-streamed in listen-only mode on the company’s investor relations site. This update was released by the company, based in Atlanta, GA.

data.title: South Plains Financial, Inc. Completes Merger With BOH Holdings, Inc.
data.description: South Plains Financial, Inc. completed the merger of BOH Holdings, Inc. with itself, continuing as the surviving corporation, and the merger of BOH’s subsidiary, Bank of Houston, with City Bank. The effective date of the mergers was April 1, 2026. As of December 31, 2025, BOH had total assets of $744 million, total loans of $624 million, and total deposits of $603 million.

data.title: XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust Declares its Monthly Common Shares Distribution of $0.225 per Share
data.description: On April 1, 2026, XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust announced a regular monthly distribution of $0.225 per common share (NYSE: XFLT). The distribution will be paid on May 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 15, 2026. The Trust's annualized distribution rate on market price stands at 15.72%, with an annualized distribution rate on NAV of 12.11% as of the market close on March 31, 2026.
